hero.title: AI Study Platform for ADHD —
hero.subtitle: The AI platform designed for students and professionals with ADHD. Summaries, flashcards, smart planner and personal tutor — all in one place.
hero.noCreditCard: No credit card required • Cancel anytime
hero.heroAlt: Student studying with AI support for ADHD

features.title: Everything you need, in one place
features.subtitle: Tools designed for the way your brain actually works.
features.aiAssistantDesc: Upload PDFs, notes and slides. Generate summaries, mind maps, flashcards and quizzes in seconds.
features.adhdModeDesc: Simplified interface, chunked content, dopamine-based progress system.
features.plannerDesc: Break big goals into micro-tasks with time estimates and calendar sync.
features.focusToolsDesc: Pomodoro with adaptive intervals, virtual body-doubling room and ambient sounds.
features.aiTutorDesc: Continuous support with a supportive tone, designed for people with ADHD.
features.gamificationDesc: Streaks, milestones and badges to keep motivation high every day.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps to transform the way you study.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Create your account in 30 seconds and start your 7-day free trial.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Complete a short quiz about study level, ADHD traits and goals.
howItWorks.step3Desc: PDFs, notes, slides — AI transforms them into summaries, flashcards and quizzes.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Follow your personalized plan, use the focus timer and track progress.

landingPricing.title: Simple and transparent pricing
landingPricing.subtitle: Start free with 15 NeuroCredits per month. Upgrade to Pro when you're ready.
